nodes.context: Lebanese Shia Islamist militant group and political party, involved in various criminal activities for funding.
Colombian drug cartel that allied with Hezbollah for cocaine smuggling and money laundering.
Colombian leftist guerrilla group involved in drug trafficking and alliance with Hezbollah.
Irish drug trafficking organization that coordinated a cocaine shipment with Hezbollah from Venezuela.
Charity used to collect money for Hezbollah in Nigeria, pretending to help the Lebanese community.
Digital payment service used by groups tied to Hezbollah to raise money, exploiting weak anti-money laundering rules.
Digital payment service used by groups tied to Hezbollah to raise money, exploiting weak anti-money laundering rules.

edges.context: Hezbollah received 12% of profits from cocaine smuggling and money laundering operations with the North Valley Cartel.
Hezbollah allied with FARC and North Valley Cartel in a drug smuggling and money laundering cell dismantled in 2008.
Hezbollah coordinated a cocaine shipment from Venezuela with the Kinahan Cartel, seized in Ireland in 2023.
Al-Qard Al-Hassan Association collects money for Hezbollah under the guise of charity.
Groups tied to Hezbollah use Whish Money to raise donations, bypassing sanctions.
Groups tied to Hezbollah use OMT to raise donations, bypassing sanctions.
